name: ExtensionDetectedIssue_Status
title: R5: preliminary | final | entered-in-error | mitigated additional codes
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DetectedIssue.status` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DetectedIssue.status` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DetectedIssue.status` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `DetectedIssue.status` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `DetectedIssue.status` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DetectedIssue.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `DetectedIssue.status` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `DetectedIssue.status` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.
The target context `DetectedIssue.status` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.

element.short: R5: preliminary | final | entered-in-error | mitigated additional codes
element.comment:
Element `DetectedIssue.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `DetectedIssue.status` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `DetectedIssue.status` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.
The target context `DetectedIssue.status` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.
This element is labeled as a modifier because the status contains the code entered-in-error that marks the issue as not currently valid.

element.definition: Indicates the status of the detected issue.
element.comment: This element is labeled as a modifier because the status contains the code entered-in-error that marks the issue as not currently valid.

binding.description: Indicates the status of the identified issue.
